bias.description: does not build CDF packages, validation verdicts, receipts, checkpoints, or mirrors
generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches rather than reading source Parquet bytes
models a possible destination-owned handoff path; no production CDF adapter uses this path yet

reference.name: cdf-p3-lab+duckdb
reference.semantic_work: write synthetic TLC-shaped Arrow batches with CDF row provenance to a Parquet handoff, then materialize a persistent DuckDB table through native read_parquet
